simple_types.name: Compilation_Status
simple_types.code:
type Compilation_Status is
  (In_Progress,
   Body_Postponed,
   Spec_Only,
   Done);

enumeration_literals.name: In_Progress
enumeration_literals.description: Specification or body-only is in progress.

enumeration_literals.name: Body_Postponed
enumeration_literals.description: Specification done, body will be done later.

enumeration_literals.name: Spec_Only
enumeration_literals.description: Specification-only is done, but we need to check absence of body.

enumeration_literals.name: Done
enumeration_literals.description: Specification done; possible body is done or its absence is checked.

simple_types.name: Unit_Kind

record_types.name: Library_Unit

fields.name: spec_context
fields.description: WITH & USE's visible to the spec.

tagged_types.name: Library_Data

fields.name: map
fields.description: Quick access by name to unit number

subtypes.name: Spec_Done
subtypes.code: subtype Spec_Done is Compilation_Status range Body_Postponed .. Spec_Only;

subtypes.name: Subprogram_Unit
subtypes.code: subtype Subprogram_Unit is Unit_Kind range Procedure_Unit .. Function_Unit;

subprograms.name: Apply_WITH
Apply_WITH_USE_Standard
Change_Unit_Details

parameters.description:

parameters.name: Descriptor
parameters.description:
^ Changes in the library the details for
  unit named Descriptor.Full_Name.

generic_instantiations.name: Library_Name_Mapping
generic_instantiations.code:
package Library_Name_Mapping is new Ada.Containers.Hashed_Maps
  (Key_Type        => HAT.VString,
   Element_Type    => Positive,
   Hash            => Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Hash,
   Equivalent_Keys => Ada.Strings.Unbounded."=");

generic_instantiations.name: Library_Unit_Vectors
generic_instantiations.code: package Library_Unit_Vectors is new Ada.Containers.Vectors (Positive, Library_Unit);
